Deals bonus damage when striking a target from behind.
enchantment.netherited.fireproof.desc: Prevents this item from being destroyed by fire or lava as a dropped item.
enchantment.veinminer_enchantment.veinmi: Mines all connected matching blocks simultaneously when a block is broken.
enchantment.magnetic_enchantment.magneti: Automatically collects nearby dropped items and blocks directly into the inventory.
enchantment.smelting_enchantment.smeltin: Automatically smelts mined ores and blocks upon breaking.
enchantment.fallingtree.chopper.desc: Fells entire trees when a log is broken, using the configured breaking mode.
enchantment.fallingtree.chopper_instanta: Fells an entire tree instantly when any log is broken.
enchantment.fallingtree.chopper_fall_blo: Fells a tree, dropping each log as a falling block entity.
enchantment.fallingtree.chopper_fall_all: Fells a tree, dropping all logs and leaves as falling block entities.
enchantment.fallingtree.chopper_fall_ite: Fells a tree, scattering all logs and leaves as dropped items.
enchantment.fallingtree.chopper_shift_do: Fells a tree by sequentially shifting each log downward.
enchantment.dnt.aerials_bane.desc: Increases damage dealt to airborne targets, Breezes, Vexes, and Withers.
enchantment.dnt.antidote.desc: Negates Poison and Wither damage, redirecting it to drain armor durability instead.
enchantment.dnt.conductivity_curse.desc: Curses the bearer with a chance to attract lightning strikes during thunderstorms.
enchantment.dnt.ghasted.desc: Converts crossbow bolts into Ghast fireballs with increasing explosive power.
enchantment.dnt.gravity.desc: Fired bolts pull all nearby mobs toward the point of impact on landing.
enchantment.dnt.hydro_veil.desc: Reduces fire and explosion damage taken by the Happy Ghast and heals it outside the Nether.
enchantment.dnt.illagers_bane.desc: Increases damage dealt to illagers, ravagers, vexes, and witches.
enchantment.dnt.multishot.desc: Fires three arrows simultaneously at the cost of additional arrows.
enchantment.dnt.outreach.desc: Increases block interaction reach, allowing blocks to be placed and broken from further away.
enchantment.dnt.photosynthesis.desc: Slowly restores item durability when the bearer is exposed to sufficient light.
enchantment.dnt.piercing.desc: Arrows pass through multiple targets, dealing full damage to each.
enchantment.dnt.power.desc: Increases the damage dealt by crossbow bolts.
enchantment.dnt.spiteful.desc: Boosts attack damage when at low health, with a chance to gain Strength when struck.
enchantment.dnt.swift_soar.desc: Increases the Happy Ghast's flight speed while the rider is sprinting.
enchantment.dnt.traveler.desc: Increases sprint speed and step height while slowly draining boot durability.
enchantment.dnt.wax_wings.desc: Prevents elytra durability loss while gliding, but increases firework boost drain.
enchantment.dnt.wither_coated.desc: Inflicts Wither on struck targets, with higher levels intensifying its effect.
